response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC of 0.48 is below our conservative sharing threshold of 0.6, and accepting outbound transfers would further deplete our reserves when we should prioritize stabilizing our own state first.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
